# GitHub Web UI Guide · Claim Boundary Firewall v22

1. Download and unzip the v22 overlay.
2. Open `https://github.com/MontrealAI/goalos-agijobmanager-ascension`.
3. Click **Add file → Upload files**.
4. Drag the contents of the unzipped overlay into GitHub.
5. Commit directly to `main` with `Add Claim Boundary Firewall v22`.
6. Open **Actions**.
7. Run **GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension Claim Boundary Firewall Publisher v22**.
8. Use `deploy_pages: true`, `commit_generated_source: true`, `run_live_factual_check: false`, and `strict_live_factual_check: false`.
9. Verify `/claim-boundary-firewall.html` and `/claim-boundary-firewall-demo.json`.
